reason: Verify admin UI conforms to Material 3 — check token usage, required component patterns, and forbidden patterns (no Tailwind, no hand-picked hex, no Material 2).
Verify cross-layer data-flow integrity: auth middleware->routes->DB->pages, event status transitions, tag-merge transaction correctness.
Verify no duplicate UI kit/form logic — admin reuses public-site components and tokens instead of reimplementing.
